title: First report of foodborne botulism due to Clostridium botulinum type A(B) from vegetarian home-canned pate in Hanoi, Vietnam.
author_string: Hoang, Le Huy, Nga, Tang Thi, Tram, Nguyen Thuy, Trang, Le Thi, Ha, Hoang Thi Thu et al.
abstract: Even one case of foodborne botulism constitutes a public health emergency. We report a series of cases with delayed treatment due to delayed diagnosis. Clostridium botulinum type A(B) was isolated from vegetarian home-canned pate, but not from stool samples. These are the first recorded cases of foodborne botulism in Hanoi.
